name: ATEM to TS3019
description: Portable description of the ATEM input 1-12 to AVMATRIX TS3019 lamp 1-12 trigger workflow.

mapping.inputToLamp: ATEM input N maps to TS3019 lamp N

triggersPerLamp.condition: ATEM ME1 Program source for input N becomes true
triggersPerLamp.action: TS3019 Set lamp state, lamp N, Program, Additive / transition

triggersPerLamp.condition: ATEM ME1 Program source for input N becomes false
triggersPerLamp.action: TS3019 Set lamp state, lamp N, Clear Program only, Additive / transition

triggersPerLamp.condition: ATEM ME1 Preview source for input N becomes true
triggersPerLamp.action: TS3019 Set lamp state, lamp N, Preview, Additive / transition

triggersPerLamp.condition: ATEM ME1 Preview source for input N becomes false
triggersPerLamp.action: TS3019 Set lamp state, lamp N, Clear Preview only, Additive / transition

triggersPerLamp.condition: ATEM ME1 Preview source for input N is true and Transition: Active/Running is true
triggersPerLamp.action: TS3019 Set lamp state, lamp N, Program, Additive / transition
